title: AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO JUSTIN DONTA BROWNLEE

chunks.text:
Daily Tribune, January 14, 2023; 119 OG No. 4, 646 (January 23, 2023)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11937, January 12, 2023 ]

AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO JUSTIN DONTA BROWNLEE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Justin Donta Brownlee is hereby granted Philippine citizenship with all the rights, privileges and prerogatives, as well as duties and obligations appurtenant thereto, under the Constitution and the laws of the Republic of the Philippines.

SEC. 2. Justin Donta Brownlee shall take the Oath of Allegiance duly authorized to administer the same. The Oath of Allegiance shall be registered with the Bureau of Immigration.

SEC. 3. Upon registration of the Oath of Allegiance, the Bureau of Immigration shall issue a Certificate of Naturalization to Justin Donta Brownlee who shall thereupon enter into the full enjoyment of Philippine citizenship.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect immediately upon its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

JUAN MIGUEL F. ZUBIRI

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

FERDINAND MARTIN G. ROMUALDEZ

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act, which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on November 29, 2022 and December 12, 2022, respectively.

(SGD.)

RENATO N. BANTUG, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

REGINALD S. VELASCO

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: 12 JAN 2023

(SGD.)

FERDINAND ROMUALDEZ MARCOS JR.

President of the Philippines
